PreToolUse.hook: bash -c 'VAULT_DIR="$HOME/문서/프로젝트/mac-host-commands/옵시디언"; FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "$VAULT_DIR" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -q ".obsidian/"; then echo "BLOCK: vault 노트 직접 쓰기 금지. obsidian-center API를 사용하세요."; echo "  curl -X POST http://localhost:8910/api/submit ..."; exit 2; fi'
